package rulecoverage

func NegativeCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandler() string {
    ruleID := "custom_validator_registration_inside_handler"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Per-request validator registration instead of startup-time validator wiring."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
